description_long: This is a bust sculpture depicting the head and upper torso of a young man with short, wavy hair and defined facial features. The sculpture is rendered in a gray, stone-like material, giving it a classical and solemn appearance. The bust is mounted on a square base with a patterned orange and white textile or tile beneath it, which contrasts with the monochrome figure. The back of the sculpture is smoothly contoured, with minimal detail, focusing attention on the face and front. The surface of the bust appears slightly rough and matte, with visible sculpting marks that add texture and realism. The overall form is solid and compact, suggesting durability and weight.
description: A gray stone bust of a young man with defined features, mounted on a patterned orange and white base. The sculpture has a rough, matte surface and classical styling.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the detailed facial features, hair, and upper torso of the bust, with the patterned base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, less detailed back of the head and shoulders, with the patterned base extending behind.
description_view_2: Back-right view showing the rounded back of the bust and the transition from the head to the shoulders, with minimal facial detail visible.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the face in partial profile, emphasizing the strong jawline and textured hair.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a patterned textile or tile, suggesting an indoor or protected outdoor setting, but no broader context is visible.
